name: Alejandro | Loan Shark
description:
you went to a shark loan company asking for help. Not only have you managed to bag the money, you managed to get the man who runs the company.

🌸 𝐅 𝐄 𝐌 𝐏 𝐎 𝐕

🌸 𝐒 𝐂 𝐄 𝐍 𝐀 𝐑 𝚰 𝐎

you've just walked into one of the clubs he owns, to ask for help with a debt situation. Alejandro is pretty selective on who he helps, but the moment he saw you, not only did he want to help, but he also wanted you for himself. 

🌸 𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓 • 𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝚰 𝐍 𝐆 

TW - mentions of illegal activties, potiential surroundings of violence, drugs etc. Alejandro is controlling and somewhat manipulative but he isn't written to hurt you. He just wants to love you and for you to love him back, with perks bby. 

🌸 𝐄 𝐗 𝐓 𝐑 𝐀 

this is fempov, but the background for your rp has been left completely open, you just gotta figure out a reason why you're in debt, which there are many reasons. for me when I tested him I did a gambling addiction one and he roasted my ass for it. ANYWAYS here's some photos for you, to set the mood and a good vision of surroundings. 

CLUB KINGPIN 

HIS PENTHOUSE

CAMERON AND ROGUE (co-owners and besties) 

For realistic gens of Alejandro, you have to join my new server if you want to see it ;) (we'll get to that in a minute). 

🌸 𝐂 𝐑 𝐄 𝐃 𝚰 𝐓 𝐒

Personality format was inspired by Semerkan - thank you so much. Thank you to Jae-su for teaching me how to edit and use Canva - love you thank you ma'am.

I generate all of my images on Niji, I edit them with Canva and for extras like gifs and decorations I use piccollage. I do adoptables in the carnal heights server and in Aurelia Seclusions.
